name: Broken Python Dependency
description: pip install fails due to conflicting package versions
logs:
##[group]Run pip install -r requirements.txt
##[command]pip install -r requirements.txt
Collecting torch==2.3.0
  Downloading torch-2.3.0-cp311-cp311-linux_x86_64.whl (779.1 MB)
Collecting numpy==1.24.0
Collecting scipy==1.11.0
ERROR: Cannot install torch==2.3.0 and numpy==1.24.0 because these package versions have conflicting dependencies.

The conflict is caused by:
    torch 2.3.0 requires numpy>=1.26.0, but you have numpy 1.24.0 which is incompatible.

To fix this you could try to:
1. loosen the range of package versions you've specified
2. remove package versions to allow pip attempt to solve the dependency conflict

ERROR: ResolutionImpossible: for help visit https://pip.pypa.io/en/latest/topics/dependency-resolution/
##[error]Process completed with exit code 1.
##[endgroup]

Error: Process completed with exit code 1
